tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Winter lipless crankbait: pull-and-pause retrieve to keep bait falling near the bottom. Make parallel casts along structure — stay at the fish's depth the entire retrieve. Very methodical, multiple casts to an area. Bass prefer structure with vertical edges so they can move up and down as conditions change.'

knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Winter bass move shallower than most realize — if you can reach them with crankbait, jerkbait, or slow-rolled spinnerbait in 10ft or less, power baits are first option. Fish avoid expansive flats unless warming trend pushes them to gravel points. Rocky banks and riprap are ideal — hold crawfish (primary winter forage). Big pods of shad = jerkbait or spinnerbait. No baitfish = crankbait rooting on bottom.'
